_comment: PROJECT FACTS for `proposals` — a META/tooling project: it changes hansard's OWN substrate + hooks, not an ML training run. Most ML danger-pattern keys (bad_storage, mel power, codec contract) do NOT apply and are intentionally omitted rather than faked. The keys below are the danger patterns RELEVANT to editing hansard itself.
reference_impl: hansard's own research/ substrate (plan.py, viz.py, tree.py) + hooks/ layer (router.py, planaware.py)
frozen_component: the existing on-disk substrate schema (plan.<name>.jsonl line shape, .active-project, goal/facts/glossary files) — must stay backward-readable
schema_break_example: changing the JSONL line shape read by plan.py:56 or the .active-project read at plan.py:41 without keeping old files readable -> every existing project (megafish/asr/kimi) silently breaks
